title: Mob head to Player head
description: Using this datapack, you can turn any mob head into a player head simply by using a Book and Quill along with any mob head in the game, such as a zombie head, a dragon head, or even a Carved Pumpkin.
body:
# Mob head to Player head! This datapack allows you to transform mob heads into Player Heads using a **Book and Quill**. Follow the steps below to learn how to use it: ## How to Use: ### Prepare a **Book and Quill**: - Craft or obtain a **Book and Quill** from your inventory.




### Set the Player’s Name: - Open the **Book and Quill**. - Click on the **Sign** button. - In the **Enter Book Title** field, type the exact username of the player whose head you want to create. - Click **Sign and Close** to finalize the book.




### Combine the Items: - Throw the signed **Book and Quill** and **the mob head** you want to transform (e.g., Zombie Head, Dragon Head, etc.) on the ground. - The datapack will automatically convert the mob head into a Player Head with the name you provided.




## Supported Heads: - Mob Heads: > - Zombie Head > - Dragon Head > - Creeper Head > - Skeleton Skull > - Wither Skeleton Skull > - Piglin Head - Non-Mob Heads: > - Carved Pumpkin > - Player Head ### Compatibility: - Fully compatible with all Minecraft 1.21 updates (1.21.0 to 1.21.9). ### Additional Notes: - The player’s username must be from a Java Edition account only. Usernames from other platforms, such as Bedrock Edition, will not work. - Ensure the player’s username is spelled correctly in the Enter Book Title field for the transformation to work. - This datapack is perfect for creative builds, servers, or role-playing scenarios. - If you encounter any issues, double-check that you’re using supported heads and the correct version of Minecraft.
